rows.label: qev091704_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well, this is Lan'cord's data.
That's one objective down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0002
rows.name:
Now we just need to find
the good doctor himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0012
rows.name:
Welp, we've got Lan'cord's
research data. Now we just
need the good doctor himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hmm, let's try the consoles in
other holds as well. One may turn
up a clue to his whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0003
rows.name:
Finally! It's Lan'cord's
data! Took long enough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0004
rows.name:
We should have made that roach
talk and saved some time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0005
rows.name: Plus it would have been fun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0006
rows.name:
Okay. Next time, torture
first, THEN shooting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that the Murderess's plan sounds much more efficient.

rows.label: qev091704_SEL0021
rows.name: Remind the Murderess that BLADE does not permit torture.

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0007
rows.name:
See? You get it. Who has time for
mercy when there's cash on the line?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0008
rows.name:
Speaking of, let's get back to
the city. That reward's waiting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0009_2
rows.name: You and Iriina really ARE the fun police.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0010
rows.name:
Look, when we get back, I'll be happy
to show you how useful torture can be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091704_MSG0011
rows.name: But first, let's get that reward.[ST:wait ]
